vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi trong thời gian rảnh
vocab.example: Photography is my primary leisure pursuit, allowing me to capture the subtle beauty of everyday life.

vocab.meaning: một nỗ lực/hoạt động thực hiện một mình
vocab.example: I view long-distance running as a solitary endeavor that helps me clear my head and find mental balance.

vocab.meaning: chiếm trọn tâm trí và thời gian
vocab.example: When I first started coding, it became an all-consuming hobby that I would practice late into the night.
Cooking serves as a fantastic recreational outlet for me to express my creativity outside of my corporate job.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng danh mục kỹ năng/hiểu biết
vocab.example: I've recently taken up baking to broaden my repertoire in the kitchen beyond just savory dishes.
As an amateur enthusiast of stargazing, I spent my last bonus on a high-quality telescope.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác về (điều gì đó)
vocab.example: Joining a local book club has helped foster a sense of community that I felt was missing in my life.

vocab.meaning: những giờ rảnh rỗi, không làm gì
vocab.example: I usually fill my idle hours by listening to educational podcasts or learning a new language.

vocab.meaning: kết quả hữu hình, có thể thấy được
vocab.example: I love woodworking because it produces tangible results that I can actually use around the house.

vocab.meaning: kỳ ảo, bất chợt, đầy ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: I enjoy creating whimsical sketches in my notebook during my commute to work.
